name: Favorite Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
Beat the margarine and brown sugar until light and fluffy. Add flour and walnuts, mixing well. Set aside half of the crumb mixture.
Press the remaining crumb mixture into the bottom of an 8-inch square pan. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine the cream cheese, granulated sugar, and vanilla. Mix until well blended. Add the egg and mix well.
Layer half of the candy over the crust. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the candy layer. Combine the remaining candy with the reserved crumb mixture. Sprinkle this over the cream cheese layer.
Bake at 350 degrees F. for an additional 20 minutes. Allow to cool before cutting into 16 equal squares.
